prompt: Change the dollar sign to a Japanese yen sign. Make the yen sign consistent with every angle of the sprite sheet.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. On the pixel art gold coin sprite sheet, change every dollar sign ($) to a Japanese yen sign (¥). The yen symbol must be rendered in the same pixel art style and accurately reflect the perspective for each coin's rotation and visible face across the sprite sheet.
objects: pixel art gold coin sprite sheet
